name: flight_search
description: Search for flight information between cities on a specific date. Use this when the user asks about flights (e.g., '查询航班', '帮我查一下从北京到上海的航班'). This tool provides flight details including flight number, departure/arrival times, airports, price, duration, and whether meals are included.

departure_city.description: Departure city name in Chinese (e.g., '北京市', '上海', '深圳')

destination_city.description: Destination city name in Chinese (e.g., '上海市', '北京', '广州')
